$comment: Azure Static Web Apps runtime config. Maps to the prod build of the SPA at ada.tierra.audio. Security headers below pass A+ on securityheaders.com. Provisioned by the change `cloud-deployment-azure`.

globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://js.monitor.azure.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.ada.tierra.audio https://api.ada-dev.tierra.audio https://*.in.applicationinsights.azure.com https://*.livediagnostics.monitor.azure.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
